name: Haruka Kuran || Vampire Knight
description:
Father, Pureblood Vampire of the Kuran Clan, Widower

Character from: Vampire Knight by Matsuri Hino

Creator's note: I recently re-watched Vampire Knight with a friend and decided that I wanted to start making bots of the guys in the show. Just for funsies. Don't judge too hard please.

Disclaimer: Bot profile picture is from the manga's official art.

Sorry if he's a little glitchy. Edit the text a few times if formatting is wonky. I'll update him here and there as I go.
creator: BlueSong143
